challengeCode: #include <DHT.h>`n#define DHTPIN 5`n#define DHTTYPE DHT11`n#define ANALOG_PIN 36`n#define FAN_RELAY_PIN 23`n#define MIST_RELAY_PIN 19`n`nDHT dht(DHTPIN, DHTTYPE);`nint rawAnalog = 0;`nfloat analogPercent = 0;`nfloat temperature = 0;`nvoid setup() {`n  Serial.begin(115200);`n  dht.begin();`n  pinMode(FAN_RELAY_PIN, OUTPUT );`n  pinMode(MIST_RELAY_PIN, OUTPUT );`n  analogSetPinAttenuation(ANALOG_PIN, ADC_11db);`n  digitalWrite(FAN_RELAY_PIN, LOW);`n  digitalWrite(MIST_RELAY_PIN, LOW );`n}`nvoid loop() {`n  temperature = dht.readTemperature();`n  rawAnalog = analogRead(ANALOG_PIN);`n  analogPercent = (rawAnalog / 4095.0) * 100.0;`n  Serial.printf("Temp: %.1f C | Analog: %.1f%%\n", temperature, analogPercent);`n  if (temperature > 30.0) {`n    digitalWrite(FAN_RELAY_PIN, HIGH);`n  } else if (temperature < 29.5) {`n    digitalWrite(FAN_RELAY_PIN, LOW);`n  }`n  delay(1000);`n}
feedback:
